reflection:
two 4am bedtimes in four nights, and now the lymph node under your chin is sore and your sinus is clogged on the left. that is not bad luck. that is a body running on no sleep starting to fight something off.

you called it yourself last night. the effervescent Supradyn is keeping you wired, you wrote it twice. and it is a B-complex, which has never sat right with you. you went to bed at 4 again, woke at 8:25, and the morning heart pounding was at a 5. you keep saying you still have energy even without sleep, like that is a win. it is not. it is the nervous system stuck on, and the sore throat is the bill coming due.

the line that stuck with me was in your journal. you wrote i'm avoiding being honest, then listed everything you aced, the Maria and Danil meeting you made straight, Scatter Kings, the supercomputer you actually went and bought. but the thing underneath, the not sleeping and the wanting more in that part of your life, you keep circling it and not landing on it. you already know that.

one thing today. skip the effervescent pill this morning. you flagged it twice, so test it. one clean night without it tells you more than another week of guessing.

last stretch of Turkey. get one real sleep before you fly home. you have earned it.
opener: two 4am nights in a row and now you're starting to get sick
focus_for_today: skip the effervescent Supradyn today, you flagged it twice as keeping you wired
